results.name: cycle-dft-team-captain
results.description: A cycle of legendary creatures featuring the team captains of each team participating in the second edition of the [Ghirapur Grand Prix](https://tagger.scryfall.com/tags/artwork/ghirapur-grand-prix).

results.name: cycle-dual-land
results.description: Dual land cycles. See also [dual land](https://tagger.scryfall.com/tags/card/dual-land) for non-cycle dual lands.
